summary: REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear implemented via a shared markdown parser (with <pre><code> rendering and overflow-x handling) and an added toolbar action for fenced code blocks. REQ-3 is only partially evidenced: CRLF normalization and optional language fences are implemented, but graceful rendering of unterminated code blocks at EOF is not clearly implemented in the shown parser logic. Several unrelated 'game mod' features and a change in a constrained file were introduced without being requested.

missing_requirements.requirement: If the content ends while still inside a code block, the preview/reader still renders the collected code content in a code block rather than collapsing it into normal text (fail gracefully for missing closing backticks).
missing_requirements.reason: In the visible parser logic, code blocks are only flushed when a closing fence line is encountered; there is no shown end-of-document flush of an open code block after iterating through lines. If the closing ``` is missing, the collected code may never be rendered.

hallucinated_features.description: Added a 'project_state.json' project tracking file with AR-* items unrelated to the requested frontend behavior changes.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by the BuildRequest requirements or constraints.

hallucinated_features.description: Introduced/modified a 'game mod' module and related routes/pages/hooks (e.g., /game-mod routes, GameModPage, GameModDetailPage, useGameModQueries, query exports).
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested; BuildRequest is specifically about Markdown fenced code blocks in articles and editor preview.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified a constrained file (useInternetIdentity.ts) despite the explicit instruction not to edit it.
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest constraint forbids changes under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, but the diff lists it as modified.
